name: Plum-Filled Coffee Cake ~
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Chop enough plums to get 1 1/2 cups. Combine chopped plums with 1/4 cup sugar and the cornstarch. Cream butter with remaining 3/4 cup sugar. Beat in eggs, milk, flour, baking powder, salt and cinnamon until well combined. Pour half the batter into greased and floured 8-inch springform pan. Spoon on plum mixture. Spread remaining batter over plums to cover. Combine 2 tablespoons sugar and 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon and sprinkle on the cake. Bake for 40 minutes and then loosely cover top with foil. Continue baking for 20 minutes until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool partially. Remove pan sides. Place on plate and cut into wedges to serve. Best served warm or at room temperature.
